'''Druyza''' were herd animals native to [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]]. They were the primary prey of [[monnok]]s, and the [[Ibhaan'I]] nomads raised them as beasts of burden and mounts, as well as for their [[Leather/Legends|hide]], meat, and dung. The dung was used to make bricks.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-06-XX -->''[[The Black Sands of Socorro]]''
